summary: Comprehensive testing of CLI Event Sync, CCE Worker, AI Detection Dashboard, SOAR AI Defense tab, and Seraphic Watch UI theme. All 16 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified with all new features working correctly. Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in SOAR executions endpoint.
passed_tests: CLI Event Ingestion - POST /api/cli/event successfully ingests CLI commands
CLI Event Ingestion - POST /api/cli/event with custom timestamp works
CLI Event Ingestion - Validation error returned for missing required fields
CLI Session Summaries - GET /api/cli/sessions/all returns session summaries with ML scores
CLI Session Summaries - GET /api/cli/sessions/all with min_ml filter works correctly
CLI Session Summaries - GET /api/cli/sessions/{host_id} returns host-specific summaries
CLI Commands - GET /api/cli/commands/{host_id} returns commands for host
Deception Hits - POST /api/deception/event ingests deception hits and triggers SOAR
Deception Hits - GET /api/deception/hits returns deception hit events
Deception Hits - GET /api/deception/hits with severity filter works
SOAR Stats - GET /api/soar/stats returns playbook statistics
SOAR Executions - GET /api/soar/executions returns execution history (fixed ObjectId bug)
Session Summary Ingestion - POST /api/cli/session-summary ingests summaries and triggers SOAR
Session Summary Ingestion - High-risk session (ML >= 0.92) triggers AI playbooks
CCE Worker Integration - CLI commands trigger CCE analysis and generate summaries

features: Stats: 2.4M+ Threats Blocked, 150K+ AI Scans/Day, <10ms Response Time

Session Analysis panel with detailed metrics

Seraph AI logo and Seraphic Watch branding

ai_defense_playbooks_verified: AI-RECON-DEGRADE-01: Machine-Paced Recon Loop — Degrade + Observe
AI-DECOY-HIT-CONTAIN-01: Decoy/Honey Token Hit — Immediate Containment
AI-CRED-ACCESS-RESP-01: Credential Access Pattern — Decoy + Credential Controls
AI-PIVOT-CONTAIN-01: Autonomous Pivot / Toolchain Switching — Contain Fast
AI-EXFIL-PREP-CUT-01: Exfil Prep — Cut Egress + Snapshot

cce_worker_status.log_evidence: CCE Worker started successfully, analyzing sessions

critical_code_review_comments: Fixed MongoDB ObjectId serialization bug in /app/backend/soar_engine.py - get_executions() and evaluate_event() methods now sanitize _id fields before returning data
CCE Worker properly initializes on backend startup and runs every 10 seconds
CLI Command Monitor class in advanced_agent.py properly sends CLI events to server
AI Defense playbooks correctly trigger based on machine_likelihood and intent conditions
updated_files: /app/backend/soar_engine.py - Fixed ObjectId serialization in get_executions() and evaluate_event()
/app/backend/tests/test_cli_cce_soar.py - Created comprehensive test suite for CLI/CCE/SOAR features
seed_data_creation: CLI commands, session summaries, and deception hits created during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features working: CLI event ingestion via POST /api/cli/event, session summaries via GET /api/cli/sessions/all, CCE Worker running on backend startup (10s interval), AI Detection dashboard showing live session data with ML scores, SOAR page with AI Defense tab showing 6 AI playbooks, Seraphic Watch UI theme applied correctly. Fixed ObjectId serialization bug in SOAR executions endpoint. Test data includes 20+ sessions analyzed, 8 high risk, 5 critical, 4 deception hits.

soar_objectid_fix.issue: SOAR executions endpoint returned 500 error due to MongoDB ObjectId serialization
soar_objectid_fix.fix: Added sanitization to remove _id fields from trigger_event and step_results in get_executions() method, and sanitize event before storing in memory in evaluate_event() method
